title: Bone Bone Block
description: Adds a new decorative block - the Bone Bone Block! Craftable using Bone Blocks, and can be converted back to Bone Blocks.
body:
**Adds a new decorative block - the Bone Bone Block! Craftable using Bone Blocks, and can be converted back to Bone Blocks. Perfect for builders who need to have the bone side on all sides of the block.**

If you would like to support me and my work feel free to go to my [ko-fi]([https://ko-fi.com/viktoreeej](https://ko-fi.com/viktoreeej)).

[![ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/N4N716BNLY)

### ✨ Features

- Bone Bone Block with all-sided bone texture
- Simple 2x2 crafting using Bone Blocks (4 blocks per craft)
- Reverse crafting into vanilla Bone Blocks
- Found in Building Blocks creative tab

### 🛠️ Contributing

Help improve the mod at my [GitHub repository](https://github.com/Styzex/Bone-Bone-Block/).

### 🐛 Bug Reports

Report issues via the [tracker](https://github.com/Styzex/Bone-Bone-Block/issues) on the mods repoitory:
- Minecraft & mod versions
- Full mod list
- Crash/logs
- Steps to reproduce
